title: caladenia × resupina
intro: Caladenia × resupina, also known as the Resupinate Spider Orchid, is a hybrid plant species within the Caladenia genus, characterized by its unique inverted petals. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine, with its roots and tubers reported to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Caladenia × resupina are said to include relief from respiratory issues, fever reduction, and potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and tubers are typically dried and used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are believed to provide therapeutic benefits when consumed.
